backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a workshop POS system, defining types and persistent state for inventory, transactions, customers, and shop settings, with CRUD endpoints and reporting functions.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module that declares the full persistent state shape and exports a no-op `run` function applied during canister upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that Excel import upsert logic (using ID as unique key) is implemented in `InventoryPage.tsx` with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of short summaries for every frontend source file, describing each component's purpose and notable recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including sidebar, chart, and brand color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Kasir Bengkel' that mounts the React app at `#root` via `src/main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with five routes (Cashier, Inventory, Transactions, Reports, Settings) inside a dark-themed layout with a sidebar.
frontend/src/components/Receipt.tsx: Print-friendly receipt component displaying transaction details, itemized list, subtotal, optional discount, total, and shop branding in Indonesian.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: Dark sidebar navigation component with five Indonesian-labeled links and a brand logo, highlighting the active route.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP actor, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for all backend interactions including inventory CRUD, transactions, shop settings, and reports, each invalidating relevant query caches on mutation success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for theming, and includes print styles for 80mm receipt printing.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for class name merging, Indonesian Rupiah formatting, timestamp formatting, and date-to-nanoseconds conversion helpers.
frontend/src/lib/xlsx.ts: Self-contained XLSX file writer and reader implemented without external dependencies, using CRC-32, raw DEFLATE compression via CompressionStream, and a ZIP builder to produce valid .xlsx files.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CashierPage.tsx: Cashier POS page that allows searching and pinning inventory items, managing a shopping cart, creating transactions, and displaying a printable receipt upon checkout.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryPage.tsx: Inventory management page that displays, adds, edits, deletes, imports (via XLSX), and exports inventory items with search filtering and form dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/ReportsPage.tsx: Reports page with tabbed views for daily, monthly, top-selling items, and profit/loss reports, using date filters and backend query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Settings page for managing shop info (name, address, phone, thank-you message) and uploading a logo with progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/TransactionHistoryPag: Transaction history page with search and date-range filtering, plus detail view, print, and delete functionality for past transactions.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom colors (using OKLCH), fonts, border radii, shadows, animations, and plugins for the project.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for 'Kasir Bengkel' tracking version, existing features, architectural notes, and a pending feature request about Axle Excel import using ID as the upsert key.
